description: HOW TO ORDER: Choose size and colour, click Customize Now. In the box type the name you would like, upto 12 letters. Add to Basket. These are gorgeous baby personalised sleepsuits. Lovely sleepsuit personalised with a name of your choice! The sleepsuits come in various colours, long sleeved, enclosed feet and press stud popper through fastening to the front. The embroidered name will be in grey. Your embroidered name can be upto 12 letters. Returns Policy: As this is a personalised item, if there isn't a manufacturing problem with the product or the personalised name embroidery, returns cannot be accepted.
